Part I. Foundations
Every implementation guide needs to start with a common base from which to build. In this case, the basic foundations of SRE include
SLOs, monitoring, alerting, toil reduction, and simplicity
. Getting these basics right will set you up well to succeed on your SRE journey.
The following chapters explore techniques for turning these core principles into concrete practices for your organization.
